name: AppTech Payments Corp.
business: AppTech offers a suite of financial technology solutions including digital banking, omnichannel payments, onboarding automation, compliance workflows, and cross-border payments. It sells to financial institutions (especially smaller and mid-sized banks), technology providers, and enterprise brands.

exposures.sentence: AppTech offers a suite of financial technology solutions designed to empower financial institutions, technology providers, and enterprise brands to deliver modern, digital-first financial experiences.

tamClaims.claim: PwC estimates a $60 billion revenue opportunity across digital payment channels
tamClaims.sentence: PwC estimates a $60 billion revenue opportunity across digital payment channels, driven by mobile wallets, ACH systems, and embedded financial services.

tamClaims.claim: The digital banking market is projected to reach approximately $2.6 trillion by 2027 with more than 78 million users
tamClaims.sentence: The same report estimates that digital banking, including FDIC-insured neobanks offering modern financial services, will reach a value of approximately $2.6 trillion by 2027, with more than 78 million users.
